questions.question: Prophet Muhammad was born in
questions.explanation: Prophet Muhammad was born in Mecca

questions.question: The Quran has _____ chapters
questions.explanation: The Quran has 114 Surahs (chapters)

questions.question: The Hajj is the pilgrimage to
questions.explanation: Hajj is the pilgrimage to Mecca, one of the Five Pillars

questions.explanation: Zakat is obligatory charitable giving in Islam

questions.question: The migration of Prophet Muhammad from Mecca to Medina is called
questions.explanation: Hijra = migration from Mecca to Medina in 622 CE
